Name: Description
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: A procedure-first sequence that teaches the four standard arithmetic algorithms (addition, subtraction, long multiplication, long division) to mastery. Each unit pairs a short Math Antics explainer video with its free companion worksheet, then Khan Academy practice drilled until mastered.

Name: Publisher
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Math Antics & Khan Academy

Name: Grade Level
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Any

Name: Link
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: https://mathantics.com

Name: Title
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Description

Name: Watch: Multi-Digit Addition
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Math Antics explainer for the column-addition algorithm with carrying.

Name: Worksheet: Multi-Digit Addition
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Work every problem. Self-check with the answer key: https://mathantics.com/files/pdfs/Worksheets_MultiDigitAddition_Answers.pdf

Name: Multi-digit addition
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Drill Khan's multi-digit addition exercise until it reads Mastered.

Name: Watch: Multi-Digit Subtraction
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Math Antics explainer for the column-subtraction algorithm with borrowing.

Name: Worksheet: Multi-Digit Subtraction
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Work every problem. Self-check with the answer key: https://mathantics.com/files/pdfs/Worksheets_MultiDigitSubtraction_Answers.pdf

Name: Multi-digit subtraction
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Drill Khan's multi-digit subtraction exercise until it reads Mastered. Push hard on the borrowing-across-zeros problems (e.g. 7000 minus 2384) - that is the case that trips up remediation learners.

Name: Watch: Multi-Digit Multiplication Pt.1
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Math Antics: multiplying a multi-digit number by a single-digit number (first stage of long multiplication). Note: shaky times-tables will stall this unit and long division - firm up facts first if needed.

Name: Worksheet: Multi-Digit Multiplication Pt.1
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Work every problem. Self-check with the answer key: https://mathantics.com/files/pdfs/Worksheets_MultiDigitMultiplicationPart1_Answers.pdf

Name: Watch: Multi-Digit Multiplication Pt.2
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Math Antics: the full long-multiplication algorithm with partial products and the placeholder zero.

Name: Worksheet: Multi-Digit Multiplication Pt.2
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Work every problem. Self-check with the answer key: https://mathantics.com/files/pdfs/Worksheets_MultiDigitMultiplicationPart2_Answers.pdf

Name: Multiply 2-digit numbers
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Drill Khan's 2-digit multiplication exercise (partial products) until it reads Mastered.

Name: Multiply 3-digit by 2-digit whole numbers
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Drill Khan's 3-digit by 2-digit multiplication exercise until it reads Mastered.

Name: Watch: Basic Division
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Math Antics: what division is, the vocabulary (dividend, divisor, quotient), and remainders - the concept before the algorithm.

Name: Worksheet: Basic Division
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Work every problem. Self-check with the answer key: https://mathantics.com/files/pdfs/Worksheets_BasicDivision_Answers.pdf

Name: Watch: Long Division
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Math Antics: the long-division algorithm (divide, multiply, subtract, bring down) with a single-digit divisor.

Name: Worksheet: Long Division
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Work every problem. Self-check with the answer key: https://mathantics.com/files/pdfs/Worksheets_LongDivision_Answers.pdf

Name: Watch: Long Division with 2-Digit Divisors
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Math Antics: extending long division to two-digit divisors, including estimating each quotient digit.

Name: Worksheet: Long Division with 2-Digit Divisors
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Work every problem. Self-check with the answer key: https://mathantics.com/files/pdfs/Worksheets_LongDivisionWith2DigitDivisors_Answers.pdf

Name: Divide multi-digit numbers by 2, 3, 4, and 5 (remainders)
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Drill dividing by single-digit divisors 2-5, with remainders, until it reads Mastered.

Name: Divide multi-digit numbers by 6, 7, 8, and 9 (remainders)
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Drill dividing by the harder single-digit divisors 6-9, with remainders, until it reads Mastered.

Name: Basic multi-digit division
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Drill Khan's basic multi-digit division exercise until it reads Mastered.

Name: Division by 2-digits
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Drill dividing by 2-digit divisors - the hardest case - until it reads Mastered.

Name: Watch: Decimal Arithmetic
The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Math Antics: applying all four algorithms to decimal numbers by lining up the decimal point. Proves the algorithms transfer.

The Standard Algorithms: Arithmetic to M: Work every problem. Self-check with the answer key: https://mathantics.com/files/pdfs/Worksheets_DecimalArithmetic_Answers.pdf
